prompt: Ultra-realistic fashion beauty portrait of a stylish young woman with long silky dark-brown hair and soft curtain bangs, wearing an oversized chunky black knit sweater. She poses elegantly against a deep black studio background, partially covering one eye with her hand while gazing confidently into the camera. Soft fair skin, natural matte makeup, warm blush, defined brows, subtle eyeliner, and rich velvet-red lips. Calm, mysterious, high-fashion expression with a modern editorial aesthetic. Professional studio lighting creates dramatic contrast between light and shadow, emphasizing facial structure, hair texture, and the cozy knit fabric. Minimalist composition, luxury fashion campaign mood, sophisticated monochrome styling, clean black-on-black palette with subtle skin-tone highlights. Sharp focus on the visible eye, premium beauty photography, elegant and timeless atmosphere. Shot on a full-frame camera, 85mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed skin texture, soft directional key light, cinematic contrast, high-end magazine editorial, luxury fashion advertisement, photorealistic, HDR, 8K resolution, masterpiece quality. Negative Prompt: blurry, low resolution, low quality, bad anatomy, extra fingers, deformed hands, duplicate limbs, asymmetrical eyes, distorted face, cartoon, anime, CGI, painting, plastic skin, excessive retouching, overexposed highlights, underexposed shadows, noise, grain, watermark, logo, text, cluttered background, motion blur, unrealistic proportions, oversaturated colors.
promptEn: Ultra-realistic fashion beauty portrait of a stylish young woman with long silky dark-brown hair and soft curtain bangs, wearing an oversized chunky black knit sweater. Soft fair skin, natural matte makeup, warm blush, defined brows, subtle eyeliner, and rich velvet-red lips. Calm, mysterious, high-fashion expression with a modern editorial aesthetic. promptZh: 超写实时尚美妆肖像，主角是一位时尚的 年轻女性，留着丝滑的深棕色长发和柔和的八字刘海，身穿 超大款粗棒针黑色针织毛衣。她优雅地伫立在深黑色影棚背景前，单手轻遮一只眼睛，自信地凝视镜头。肤质细腻白皙，自然哑光妆容，温暖腮红，眉形精致，眼线柔和，搭配浓郁的 丝绒红唇。神情冷静而神秘，充满现代时尚杂志的审美感。专业影棚灯光营造出明暗对比强烈的戏剧效果，突显面部轮廓、发丝质感以及舒适的针织面料。构图极简，散发奢华时尚大片氛围，精致的单色造型，纯粹的黑调搭配微妙的肤色高光。焦点清晰地落在可见的眼睛上，顶级美妆摄影，优雅而永恒的氛围。使用全画幅相机拍摄，85mm 镜头，f/1.8 大光圈，浅景深，超细腻皮肤纹理，柔和的定向主光，电影级对比度，高端杂志社论风格，奢华时尚广告，照片级真实感，HDR，8K 分辨率，大师级品质。负面提示词：模糊，低分辨率，低质量，解剖结构错误，多余手指，手部畸形，肢体重复，眼睛不对称，面部扭曲，卡通，动漫，CGI，绘画，塑料感皮肤，过度修图，高光过曝，阴影欠曝，噪点，颗粒感，水印，Logo，文字，背景杂乱，运动模糊，比例不协调，色彩过饱和。
